creator: melsonr@earthlink.net
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA512

Upgrading phpGedView to a newer version is all very well and good - if
you update it to a current version.  pGV is now at 4.0.2 and much
improved over the 3.X versions in terms of databases recognized, reports
and user interface.

FWIW, I regularly download pGV from sourceforge and install and use it
with no problems and without patches.  Only gotcha I can see is a
problem with the current version of php{4,5}, which only recently surfaced.

Bob Melson

- --
Robert G. Melson | Rio Grande MicroSolutions | El Paso, Texas
- -----
"People unfit for freedom---who cannot do much with it---are
hungry for power." ---Eric Hoffer
